span.p: BioMed-Agent System Architecture / 系统架构 — Fig 1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📝 Agent 4: ReportAgent 报告生成智能体
多源整合 → 6强制章节(含阴性结果) → [HUMAN REVIEW]标记

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🧠 Agent 1: LiteratureAgent 文献检索智能体
PubMed多轮检索 → 结构化证据链EvidenceLink → 1-3个可验证假设

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🛡 L4 Gate #1
A2验证A1输出
证据链一致性 / 假设-证据对应 / 置信度合理性

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📐 Agent 2: OrchestrationAgent 分析编排智能体
LLM动态DAG生成 → 假设分类(single_gene/pathway/multi_gene) → 方法兼容校验

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🛡 L4 Gate #3
A4验证A3输出
统计量合理性 / 跨节点矛盾 / 效应量阈值 / 覆盖率

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⚡ Agent 3: AnalysisAgent 分析执行智能体
Think→Act→Observe → 三层数据访问(缓存→实时→降级) → F1-F5失败恢复

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
👤 用户问题 User Question
CSTB在结直肠癌中的预后价值与免疫浸润

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🔧 分析工具集 Analysis Tools
TCGADataAccessor 差异表达 | SurvivalTools Cox+KM | DrugTools GDSC2 | ImmuneTools 免疫浸润

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📄 产出 Output
结构化报告(.md) + 执行日志 + L4警告清单 → 进入S4技术报告/S5投递打包
